creator: magik@roorback.net
text:
From diffs I removed all entries like this one:

-# $FreeBSD: ports/x11-wm/enlightenment/Makefile,v 1.124 2012/04/10
18:04:10 rm Exp $
+# $FreeBSD: ports/x11-wm/enlightenment/Makefile,v 1.122 2011/10/24
03:33:20 stas Exp $
#

and in Mk/bsd.efl.mk I changed maintainer to magik@roorback.net

Also I merged all diffs to one:
http://files.roorback.net/e17/diffs/all.diff

but this file don't have merged shar archives with new ports,
but since there are only 18 new ports, this shouldn't be a huge problem
